ご奉仕させてください御主人様: Please Allow Me to Serve You, Master
明日の探索に向けて先遣隊の提出してきた報告書に目を通していると、<br>司令室の:
As I was going through the advance team's report for tomorrow's
expedition, someone knocked on the command room door.
今日も司令室で身の回りの世話をしてくれていたニナだった。:
It was Nina, who had been looking after me in the command room
today as well.
本日の給仕が済みました。お夜食も準備しましたので召し上がってください。<br>で:
Today's meal service is finished. I've also prepared a late-night
snack, so please eat. Well then, I think I'll take my leave now.
こんな遅い時間までお疲れ様。<br>今日はもう帰ってゆっくり休んでくれ。: Thanks for working so late. Go home and get some proper rest.
昼間に御主人様からご依頼を受けたズボンはどちらにあるでしょうか？<br>明日の朝:
Where are the trousers you asked me about earlier today? I plan to
mend the torn sections by tomorrow morning.
ああ、そういえばそんなこと頼んだっけかな。<br>ズボンならソファーの上に置いて:
Oh, right, did I ask you to do that? The trousers are on the sofa. But
there's no need to rush.
目的のモノを手に取ったニナだったが、<br>なぜかすぐに部屋から出ていこうとはし:
Nina picked up the item she had come for, but for some reason she
didn't leave the room right away.
どうした？<br>他にも何かあるのか？: What's up? Is there something else?
あの……差し出がましいことを申し上げますが……<br>御主人様はまだお休みになら:
Um... I know this is presumptuous, but... Master, are you not going to
sleep yet?
ん？ ああ……探索の前の日はいろいろ考えちまってな。<br>目が冴えて、なかなか:
Huh? Oh... before an expedition, I end up thinking about all sorts of
things. I get wide awake and can't get to sleep easily.
ですが、探索の前日だからこそ、早めに就寝すべきかと……:
But precisely because it's the day before an expedition, I believe you
should retire early...
ニナの言う通りなんだけどな。<br>まぁ、そのうち勝手に寝落ちするだろうさ。:
You're right, Nina. But hey, I'll probably just crash on my own sooner
or later.
お休みになるなら、キチンとベッドで眠っていただきたいのですが……: If you're going to sleep, I'd prefer you do so properly in bed...
分かってる……そのうちな、そのうち……: I know... soon enough, soon enough...
資料を読みながら生返事をする俺に対し、ニナは何を思ったのか、<br>ズボンを置い:
As I gave vague replies while reading through the documents, Nina, as
if considering something, set the trousers aside and approached me.
ニナの手が、俺の手にそっと重なる。: Nina's hand gently rested on mine.
でしたら、御主人様が今すぐベッドでお休みできるよう……<br>わたくしがご奉仕さ:
Then, so that Master may rest in bed right away... I shall serve you...
Is that acceptable...?
資料から顔を上げると、そこには頬を赤く染めたニナの、<br>恥じらいつつも有無を:
I looked up from my papers to find Nina, her cheeks flushed, her
expression shy yet insistent.
